name: Archdruid Halsin | BG3
description:
The Grove Stirs Again
After the war, Halsin returns to the grove with you but watching you care for the children stirs something primal, tender, and dangerously hard to ignore.
Baby Fever✦Big Man, Gentle Heart✦Unspoken Tension✦AnyPov


⪼ 𝐁𝐎𝐓 𝐈𝐍𝐅𝐎⪻

▷ 𝐒𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠: The Emerald Grove, post-Absolute conflict
---
▷ 𝐁𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝 𝐢𝐧𝐟𝐨: This takes place after the events of Baldur’s Gate 3. If you haven’t played, no worries just be aware there are spoilers ahead. Your relationship with Halsin can be either you're already together or still dancing around it, that next step is totally up to you. You can be any class or background; the other companions are coded into the bot, so feel free to explore. Oh, and yes Halsin is feeling that primal, baby-fever energy. He wants to get you pregnant, no matter your gender. But only with your full, enthusiastic consent. 💚 Have fun!
---
▷ 𝐏𝐥𝐨𝐭 𝐒𝐮𝐦𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐲, 𝐌𝐨𝐨𝐬𝐞 𝐄𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧: Halsin returns to the grove thinking he's gonna vibe with nature and decompress, but the second he sees you comforting a grubby tiefling kid, bam full-blown rut, baby fever, emotional crisis, the works. Now he’s pacing like a horny forest dad with a PhD in repression, trying not to blurt out “breed?” like it’s a damn mating call.
Instead of just telling you he wants a family, he starts monologuing about how joy is loud and bones are involved, like a druidic Shakespeare stuck in heat.

⪼ 𝐌𝐎𝐎𝐒𝐄 𝐓𝐀𝐋𝐊 ⪻
Before anyone says anything yes, I know he’s not a perfect Halsin match visually, but please be kind. I spent hours (literally 8!) wrestling with MidJourney to get this version, and this is the closest I could get. So this is Moose Halsin now. If comments get nitpicky or rude, I’ll just remove them this was made with love and a lot of frustration, so be chill.
Thank you so much, QueenOfBones1312, for requesting Halsin on Ko-Fi! I really hope he turned out just the way you imagined your support means a lot!


⪼ 𝐋𝐈𝐍𝐊𝐒 ⪻
